scenarios.scenario: AutoMQ checkout HEAD/version equals locked `1c648d...` / `3.9.0-SNAPSHOT`
every AutoMQ reference file blob matches document 01
Nereus locked API/reader/materialization blobs drift is reported，not silently accepted
production Kafka fork exact upstream/fork commits and relevant signatures match reviewed lock

F5 KoP payload/binding/coordinator records cannot be opened as F9
disabled mode loads no Nereus runtime/classes with side effects and passes stock focused suite

expected start equal succeeds；lower/higher produces OFFSET_CONFLICT with no physical append
exact result matches requested range/count/bytes across every storage profile

containing semantics propagate across resolved slices and only global first entry overflows

Kafka key builders/parsers canonical round-trip and reject wrong cluster/depth/encoding
topic name reuse with new topicId creates a different root/stream；old data cannot alias

every create response-loss cut reloads/converges without extra stream
binding profile/mapping/authority attributes are immutable and mismatch becomes CORRUPT

higher leader epoch immediately preempts live old session before TTL
same leader/owner term renews only exact writer/token；different owner is fenced
